title: CEO Compensation vs Stock Performance 2026
description: The highest-paid CEO earned over $200M last year. Did shareholders actually benefit? The correlation between pay and performance might surprise you.

schemas.headline: CEO Compensation vs Stock Performance 2026
schemas.description: Compare CEO total compensation to stock returns. Do the highest-paid CEOs deliver better returns? Plot compensation vs 3-year stock performance for top 50 paid CEOs.
